title: dryopteris lanceolatocristata
intro: Dryopteris lanceolatocristata, also known as the Lance-crested Shield Fern, is a species of fern native to East Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Dryopteris lanceolatocristata include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as its potential to help manage diabetes and cancer. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of tea, decoction, or tincture to harness its medicinal properties.
